name: mini-database-engine-monorepo
description: Render fallback package for monorepo root deploys

scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix "Mini-database engine backend" install && npm --prefix "Mini-database engine backend" rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source && npm --prefix "Mini-database engine frontend" install && node "Mini-database engine frontend/node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js" build "Mini-database engine frontend"
scripts.build: npm --prefix "Mini-database engine frontend" install && node "Mini-database engine frontend/node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js" build "Mini-database engine frontend"
